message:
fix(ci): fix macOS error truncation + Windows RPC JSON escaping

- macOS: relax assertion for pijs_dynamic_import_autosafe_rejects test
  to check error class only. On macOS, longer temp paths cause QuickJS
  error formatting to truncate the tail of the message.

- Windows: replace manual format!() JSON construction in
  rpc_export_html_empty_session with serde_json::json! macro. The
  manual format embeds Windows backslash paths verbatim, producing
  invalid JSON escape sequences (\?, \C, \U) that fail to parse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
